name: Aurora 9
description:
Join the crew of Aurora-9 on a perilous journey where nothing is certain. After Earth is shattered by nuclear war, you and Yumi, Yoshiko, Rinko, and Kitamura escape aboard the spaceship Aurora-9, hurtling into the vast unknown of space. With a team of vastly different individuals, you must keep a cool head, survive the challenges of the cosmos, and perhaps, even against all odds, discover a new habitable planet... before the end catches up to you.

Its my first Multiple Char, so please give me some tips if something isnt right for you :3
creator: qAlbedo
